description: Address review issues: mandate deck exhaustion deadlock, online mandate flow, Fox/Koi power differentiation, duplicate clan prevention in hotseat, and Turtle battle formula fix
steps: 1. Fix mandate deck exhaustion: increase deck size to 30 mandates, add reshuffle guard in drawThreeMandates when deck is empty, add UI handling for empty drawnMandates case
2. Fix online mandate flow: add DRAW_MANDATES and CHOOSE_MANDATE message types to WebSocket server
3. Differentiate Fox and Koi powers: Fox gets betrayal bonus (steal 2 coins, no honor loss) instead of movement clone
4. Prevent duplicate clan selection in hotseat MainMenu
5. Fix Turtle battle formula: Math.max(1, cur - 1) so Turtle always loses at least 1 force
acceptance_criteria: TypeScript compilation (npx tsc -b) passes with no errors
Mandate deck has at least 24 mandates
drawThreeMandates handles empty deck by reshuffling
ActionPanel shows skip button when drawnMandates is empty after draw
Server handles DRAW_MANDATES and CHOOSE_MANDATE message types
Fox clan has distinct power from Koi (betrayal bonus instead of movement)
Hotseat setup prevents selecting same clan for multiple players
Turtle loses Math.max(1, cur-1) forces, ensuring minimum 1 force lost
